summary: Complete E2E testing of RE'ACTIF PRO CV 3-step flow with 4 model types (classique, competences, transversale, nouvelle_generation) and Passport 'Profil Dynamique' tab with 7 dimensions. All features verified working.

backend_api.audit_cv array: Returns exactly 10 rules with regle, score, statut (ok/ameliorable/absent), diagnostic, recommandation
backend_api.modele_suggere: Returns one of: classique, competences, transversale, nouvelle_generation
backend_api.raison_modele: Returns explanation string for suggested model
backend_api.POST /api/cv/generate-models with nouvel: Accepts nouvelle_generation as valid model type
backend_api.POST /api/cv/generate-models with all 4: All 4 model types accepted (classique, competences, transversale, nouvelle_generation)
backend_api.GET /api/cv/download-pdf/classique: Returns valid PDF file with %PDF magic bytes
backend_api.GET /api/passport: Returns full passport with all 7 dimension fields
backend_api.Passport competences: Returns 33 competences with source field for validation tracking

CV Analysis Section.10 audit rule cards: All 10 audit rules displayed with data-testid

frontend_ui.Download buttons: Voir/Word/PDF buttons present for all 4 model types

passport_profil_dynamique.Tab presence: 'Profil Dynamique' tab found in Passport tabs (data-testid='passport-tab-dynamique')
passport_profil_dynamique.7 dimensions: All 7 dimensions found with numbered circles (1-7)
passport_profil_dynamique.Dimension 3 - Competences: Found showing 33 competences (Hard Skills 24, Soft Skills 9)
passport_profil_dynamique.Dimension 6 - Valeurs: Found with motivations and compatible environments
passport_profil_dynamique.Dimension 7 - Validation: Found with Auto-declare/Valide IA/Valide humain counts

test_credentials.existing_data: Has analysis results with audit (score 78/100) and 4 optimized models (classique, competences, transversale, nouvelle_generation)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test token data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CV 3-step flow fully verified with 4 model types: (1) Upload CV text triggers analysis job, (2) Analysis returns 10 audit rules with scores/statuts + score_global_cv + modele_suggere from 4 valid types (classique/competences/transversale/nouvelle_generation), (3) Generate-models optimizes selected models and stores DOCX/PDF for all 4 types. Frontend shows correct button text 'Optimiser', exactly 4 model cards, proper color-coded audit badges. Passport 'Profil Dynamique' tab working with all 7 dimensions displayed correctly.
